scripts.start: concurrently "cd ./back && npm run server" "cd ./front && npm start"
scripts.docker:push:back: docker tag carrsh-back-image:latest philipsung/carrsh-back-image:latest && docker push philipsung/carrsh-back-image:latest
scripts.docker:push:web: docker tag carrsh-web-image:latest philipsung/carrsh-web-image:latest && docker push philipsung/carrsh-web-image:latest
scripts.kube:secrets: kubectl create secret generic carrsh-back-env --from-env-file=back/.env.production --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
scripts.kube:deploy:back: npm run docker:build:back && npm run docker:push:back && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-back-deployment.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-back-service.yaml && kubectl rollout restart deployment carrsh-back-deployment
scripts.kube:deploy:web: npm run docker:build:web && npm run docker:push:web && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-web-deployment.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/carrsh-web-service.yaml && kubectl rollout restart deployment carrsh-web-deployment
scripts.kube:deploy:all: npm run kube:secrets && npm run kube:deploy:back && npm run kube:deploy:web
